name: Recruitment
description: Job openings on the website, applicant portal, CV upload, and form-based assessments tied to hiring stages.

changes: Maintenance release — upload recruitment_module_v0.0.2.zip before clients update.

Initial release (official repository): job roles link to time billing roles + default wage cards; hire sets contractor role_id and wage_rate_card_id; roles list shows live openings and pipeline counts.
Upload recruitment_module_v0.0.1.zip to plugins/recruitment_module/ before remote installs.
